dependencies.ffmpeg_version: ffmpeg version 8.1.1 Copyright (c) 2000-2026 the FFmpeg developers

results.description: Realtime factor at 1080p Balanced on M4 Pro, mean over general subset [SKIPPED: requires M4 Pro, got M5 Max]
VMAF at Balanced, mean over all clips
Savings vs non-optimized at Balanced, mean over general subset
Savings vs non-optimized at Maximum on signage subset
Playback tier fps at 1080p→4K on M4 Pro [SKIPPED: requires M4 Pro, got M5 Max]
SRCC vs human MOS on signage holdout (only valid after Phase E)

notes: Phase A.2 baseline. M5 Max. Only signage-static-logo-01 materialized (other 29 clips report 'clip not materialized'). VMAF via ffmpeg-full subprocess. Upscaler tiers return .failed pending SRVGGNet/RRDBNet weights (Phase C/D).
